meanings.definition: a flavorful addition on top of a dish
be superior or better than some standard
examples: She topped her performance of last year

meanings.definition: pass by, over, or under without making contact
examples: the balloon cleared the tree tops

meanings.definition: be at the top of or constitute the top or highest point
examples: A star tops the Christmas Tree

meanings.definition: be ahead of others; be the first
examples: she topped her class every year

meanings.definition: provide with a top or finish the top (of a structure)
examples: the towers were topped with conical roofs

meanings.definition: reach or ascend the top of
examples: The hikers topped the mountain just before noon

meanings.definition: strike (the top part of a ball in golf, baseball, or pool) giving it a forward spin

examples: They topped off their dinner with a cognac
